name: Royal Hali Iplik Tekstil Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Royal Hali Iplik Tekstil Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells carpets in Turkey. The company was formerly known as Naksan Kimya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Royal Hali Iplik Tekstil Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. in December 2007. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Royal Hali Iplik Tekstil Mobilya Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of NAKSAN Holding.
